category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Litani as a metabuild system; official Litani documentation describes building a dependency graph of commands and running builds.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is litani; the official documentation page is titled Litani Documentation.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official AWS Labs Litani documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/awslabs/aws-build-accumulator, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says metabuild system; official docs describe jobs, dependency graphs, CI stages, and command-line build execution.
